mht plot for DMR

ql

2025-05-28

#load data, the data is not q value(it is all the DMR)

formatted_data_qval <- read.csv("C:\\Users\\Administrator\\Documents\\all DMR with bin size 200\\resu_ipdmr.csv")
marked_probe <- formatted_data_qval[order(formatted_data_qval$p), ][1:10, ]
# Mark top 10 probes and rename them as DMR1-DMR10
marked_probe <- formatted_data_qval[order(formatted_data_qval$p), ][1:10, ]
marked_probe$probe <- paste0("DMR", 1:10)
# First order the data by p-value (if not already ordered)
formatted_data_qval <- formatted_data_qval[order(formatted_data_qval$p), ]

# Rename the top 10 probes in the main dataset
formatted_data_qval$probe[1:10] <- paste0("DMR", 1:10)

# Update marked_probe to use the renamed probes
marked_probe <- formatted_data_qval[1:10, ]

#package

library(ENmix)
## 载入需要的程序包：parallel
## 载入需要的程序包：doParallel
## 载入需要的程序包：foreach
## 载入需要的程序包：iterators
## 载入需要的程序包：SummarizedExperiment
## 载入需要的程序包：MatrixGenerics
## 载入需要的程序包：matrixStats
## 
## 载入程序包：'MatrixGenerics'

## 
##     colAlls, colAnyNAs, colAnys, colAvgsPerRowSet, colCollapse,
##     colCounts, colCummaxs, colCummins, colCumprods, colCumsums,
##     colDiffs, colIQRDiffs, colIQRs, colLogSumExps, colMadDiffs,
##     colMads, colMaxs, colMeans2, colMedians, colMins, colOrderStats,
##     colProds, colQuantiles, colRanges, colRanks, colSdDiffs, colSds,
##     colSums2, colTabulates, colVarDiffs, colVars, colWeightedMads,
##     colWeightedMeans, colWeightedMedians, colWeightedSds,
##     colWeightedVars, rowAlls, rowAnyNAs, rowAnys, rowAvgsPerColSet,
##     rowCollapse, rowCounts, rowCummaxs, rowCummins, rowCumprods,
##     rowCumsums, rowDiffs, rowIQRDiffs, rowIQRs, rowLogSumExps,
##     rowMadDiffs, rowMads, rowMaxs, rowMeans2, rowMedians, rowMins,
##     rowOrderStats, rowProds, rowQuantiles, rowRanges, rowRanks,
##     rowSdDiffs, rowSds, rowSums2, rowTabulates, rowVarDiffs, rowVars,
##     rowWeightedMads, rowWeightedMeans, rowWeightedMedians,
##     rowWeightedSds, rowWeightedVars
## 载入需要的程序包：GenomicRanges
## 载入需要的程序包：stats4
## 载入需要的程序包：BiocGenerics
## 
## 载入程序包：'BiocGenerics'
## The following objects are masked from 'package:stats':
## 
##     IQR, mad, sd, var, xtabs
## The following objects are masked from 'package:base':
## 
##     anyDuplicated, aperm, append, as.data.frame, basename, cbind,
##     colnames, dirname, do.call, duplicated, eval, evalq, Filter, Find,
##     get, grep, grepl, intersect, is.unsorted, lapply, Map, mapply,
##     match, mget, order, paste, pmax, pmax.int, pmin, pmin.int,
##     Position, rank, rbind, Reduce, rownames, sapply, saveRDS, setdiff,
##     table, tapply, union, unique, unsplit, which.max, which.min
## 载入需要的程序包：S4Vectors
## 
## 载入程序包：'S4Vectors'
## The following object is masked from 'package:utils':
## 
##     findMatches
## The following objects are masked from 'package:base':
## 
##     expand.grid, I, unname
## 载入需要的程序包：IRanges
## 
## 载入程序包：'IRanges'
## The following object is masked from 'package:grDevices':
## 
##     windows

## Welcome to Bioconductor
## 
##     Vignettes contain introductory material; view with
##     'browseVignettes()'. To cite Bioconductor, see
##     'citation("Biobase")', and for packages 'citation("pkgname")'.

## 载入程序包：'Biobase'

## 
##     rowMedians
## The following objects are masked from 'package:matrixStats':
## 
##     anyMissing, rowMedians
## Setting options('download.file.method.GEOquery'='auto')
## Setting options('GEOquery.inmemory.gpl'=FALSE)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
## 
## 载入程序包：'dplyr'
## The following object is masked from 'package:Biobase':
## 
##     combine
## The following objects are masked from 'package:GenomicRanges':
## 
##     intersect, setdiff, union
## The following object is masked from 'package:GenomeInfoDb':
## 
##     intersect
## The following objects are masked from 'package:IRanges':
## 
##     collapse, desc, intersect, setdiff, slice, union
## The following objects are masked from 'package:S4Vectors':
## 
##     first, intersect, rename, setdiff, setequal, union
## The following objects are masked from 'package:BiocGenerics':
## 
##     combine, intersect, setdiff, union
## The following object is masked from 'package:matrixStats':
## 
##     count
## The following objects are masked from 'package:stats':
## 
##     filter, lag
## The following objects are masked from 'package:base':
## 
##     intersect, setdiff, setequal, union
library(ggrepel)
# Prepare data
chr_levels <- c(as.character(1:22), "X", "Y")

temdata <- data.frame(
  chr   = formatted_data_qval$chr,
  start = formatted_data_qval$start,
  end   = formatted_data_qval$end,
  p     = formatted_data_qval$p,
  probe = formatted_data_qval$probe,
  fdr =  formatted_data_qval$fdr
) %>%
  filter(chr %in% chr_levels) %>%
  mutate(chr = factor(chr, levels = chr_levels)) %>%
  arrange(chr, start)

# Calculate cumulative position
offset <- 0
chr_offsets <- c()
for (chr in chr_levels) {
  chr_len <- max(temdata$start[temdata$chr == chr], na.rm = TRUE)
  chr_offsets[chr] <- offset
  offset <- offset + chr_len + 1e6
}
temdata <- temdata %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(pos_cum = 0.5*(start+end) + chr_offsets[as.character(chr)]) %>%
  ungroup()

# Mark top 10 probes
marked_probe <- temdata %>% arrange(p) %>% slice(1:10)

# Plot
ggplot(temdata, aes(x = pos_cum, y = -log10(p))) +
  geom_point(aes(color = chr), alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_point(data = marked_probe, color = "darkorange", size = 2.2) +
  geom_text_repel(data = marked_probe, aes(label = probe), size = 3,
                  max.overlaps = 1000, color = "black") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  scale_x_continuous(
    label = chr_levels,
    breaks = sapply(chr_levels, function(chr) {
      mean(temdata$pos_cum[temdata$chr == chr])
    })
  ) +
  labs(x = "Chromosome", y = expression(-log[10](p)), title = "Manhattan Plot with Labeled Top Probes") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

#####################################################################
# Plot with q-value line legend
ggplot(temdata, aes(x = pos_cum, y = -log10(p))) +
  geom_point(aes(color = chr), alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_point(data = marked_probe, color = "darkorange", size = 2.2) +
  geom_text_repel(data = marked_probe, aes(label = probe), size = 3,
                  max.overlaps = 1000, color = "black") +
  geom_hline(aes(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "Significance Threshold-0.05"),
             color = "red", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_linetype_manual(name = "", values = c("Significance Threshold-0.05" = "dashed")) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    label = chr_levels,
    breaks = sapply(chr_levels, function(chr) {
      mean(temdata$pos_cum[temdata$chr == chr])
    })
  ) +
  labs(x = "Chromosome", y = expression(-log[10](p)), title = "Manhattan Plot with Labeled Top Probes") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

########################################################################
ggplot(temdata, aes(x = pos_cum, y = -log10(p))) +
  geom_point(color = "black", alpha = 0.6) +  # uniform color for all points
  geom_point(data = marked_probe, color = "darkorange", size = 2.2) +
  geom_text_repel(data = marked_probe, aes(label = probe), size = 3,
                  max.overlaps = 1000, color = "black") +
  geom_hline(aes(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "Significance Threshold-0.05"),
             color = "red", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_linetype_manual(name = "", values = c("Significance Threshold-0.05" = "dashed")) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    label = chr_levels,
    breaks = sapply(chr_levels, function(chr) {
      mean(temdata$pos_cum[temdata$chr == chr])
    })
  ) +
  labs(x = "Chromosome", y = expression(-log[10](p)), title = "Manhattan Plot with Labeled Top Probes") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

抽取出前十的DMR命名为DMR1-10，结合上一个code标记出来，；对DMR的位置，变成二分之start+end #fdr

# Plot
ggplot(temdata, aes(x = pos_cum, y = -log10(fdr))) +
  geom_point(aes(color = chr), alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_point(data = marked_probe, color = "darkorange", size = 2.2) +
  geom_text_repel(data = marked_probe, aes(label = probe), size = 3,
                  max.overlaps = 1000, color = "black") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  scale_x_continuous(
    label = chr_levels,
    breaks = sapply(chr_levels, function(chr) {
      mean(temdata$pos_cum[temdata$chr == chr])
    })
  ) +
  labs(x = "Chromosome", y = expression(-log[10](p)), title = "Manhattan Plot with Labeled Top Probes") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

#####################################################################
# Plot with q-value line legend
ggplot(temdata, aes(x = pos_cum, y = -log10(fdr))) +
  geom_point(aes(color = chr), alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_point(data = marked_probe, color = "darkorange", size = 2.2) +
  geom_text_repel(data = marked_probe, aes(label = probe), size = 3,
                  max.overlaps = 1000, color = "black") +
  geom_hline(aes(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "Significance Threshold-0.05"),
             color = "red", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_linetype_manual(name = "", values = c("Significance Threshold-0.05" = "dashed")) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    label = chr_levels,
    breaks = sapply(chr_levels, function(chr) {
      mean(temdata$pos_cum[temdata$chr == chr])
    })
  ) +
  
  labs(x = "Chromosome", y = expression(-log[10](p)), title = "Manhattan Plot with Labeled Top Probes") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

########################################################################
ggplot(temdata, aes(x = pos_cum, y = -log10(fdr))) +
  geom_point(color = "black", alpha = 0.6) +  # uniform color for all points
  geom_point(data = marked_probe, color = "darkorange", size = 2.2) +
  geom_text_repel(data = marked_probe, aes(label = probe), size = 3,
                  max.overlaps = 1000, color = "black") +
  geom_hline(aes(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "Significance Threshold-0.05"),
             color = "red", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_linetype_manual(name = "", values = c("Significance Threshold-0.05" = "dashed")) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    label = chr_levels,
    breaks = sapply(chr_levels, function(chr) {
      mean(temdata$pos_cum[temdata$chr == chr])
    })
  ) +
  labs(x = "Chromosome", y = expression(-log[10](p)), title = "Manhattan Plot with Labeled Top Probes") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

#add # scale_y_continuous( # breaks = c(seq(0, 5, 1), seq(20, 25, 1)), # Keep only ticks outside 5–15 # limits = c(0, max(-log10(temdata$p), na.rm = TRUE)) # ensure upper bound fits all points #) +

#try delete y(5-15) for p value

# Plot
ggplot(temdata, aes(x = pos_cum, y = -log10(p))) +
  geom_point(aes(color = chr), alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_point(data = marked_probe, color = "darkorange", size = 2.2) +
  geom_text_repel(data = marked_probe, aes(label = probe), size = 3,
                  max.overlaps = 1000, color = "black") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  scale_x_continuous(
    label = chr_levels,
    breaks = sapply(chr_levels, function(chr) {
      mean(temdata$pos_cum[temdata$chr == chr])
    })
  ) +
    scale_y_continuous(
  breaks = c(seq(0, 5, 1), seq(20, 25, 1)),  # Keep only ticks outside 5–15
  limits = c(0, max(-log10(temdata$p), na.rm = TRUE))  # ensure upper bound fits all points
) +
  labs(x = "Chromosome", y = expression(-log[10](p)), title = "Manhattan Plot with Labeled Top Probes") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

#####################################################################
